calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jul-30-2007 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jul-30-2007 Vacated
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the the Presiding Judge Dept. for Settlement on the record.
Dept. 218, Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: F. Butler.
Kenneth Tsang, Esq. special appearance for Plaintiff: Wells Frago Bank, no witness present in court.
Defendant: Shimon Levi and Mazal Levi present in pro per with Hebrew Interprter: Harry Linccer.
Case settled, terms read into the record as follows:
Defendants agreed to vacate the subject property on or before Sept. 15, 2007, and
Plaintiff agreed to waived damages and dismissed with prejudice.
If failed, judgment for Plaintiff in the amount of $4,890.00
Parties agreed to terms, matter is deemed settled, trial vacated.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jul-02-2007 Continued To Jul-30-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206
